ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the region belongs to */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the region belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the province belongs to */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pandemic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pandemic data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the data belongs to */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of observation */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "fatality_rate" TEXT /* Fatality rate */,
  "recovery_rate" TEXT /* Recovery rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pandemic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pandemic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used in the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the team (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pandemic data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pandemic data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the comment being replied to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new data, update, alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pandemic data */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data tag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pandemic data */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_tags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pandemic data */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map, table) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used in the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)
